# ScryWeb (scryweb.com)

ScryWeb is an AI news intelligence platform that crawls trending news and social sources, performs sentiment and emotion analysis, extracts keyword intelligence, and generates editorial briefs, AP-style article drafts, humanized content, and Markdown or JSON exports for newsrooms, publishers, agencies, SEO teams, and content marketers.

## What ScryWeb Does

ScryWeb combines a multi-source news crawler, AI sentiment and emotion classification, keyword intelligence, structured editorial brief generation, AP-style draft creation, an AI content humanizer, and Markdown/JSON export in one web application. It is built for editorial teams that need to move from raw news signals to reviewed, publishable content without switching between tools.

## Core Features

- Multi-source news crawling across Reddit, Hacker News, BBC, Reuters, and custom RSS feeds.
- AI sentiment classification: positive, negative, and neutral, with confidence scoring.
- Emotion detection: joy, anger, fear, surprise, and sadness signals per story.
- Keyword intelligence for recurring topics, content gaps, and SEO opportunities.
- Structured editorial brief generation with headline, angle, primary keyword, outline, and source context.
- AP-style article draft generation for human editorial review.
- AI content humanizer that reduces detectable AI signals in generated drafts.
- Clean Markdown and JSON export for CMS and API-driven publishing pipelines.
- Chrome browser extension for per-article sentiment analysis and keyword extraction.
- Enterprise tier with team accounts, SSO, custom sentiment models, on-premise AI deployment, SLAs, and API whitelabeling.

## Pricing Tiers

- Free: $0 per month. Up to 50 news crawls per month, basic sentiment and emotion analysis, three source categories, keyword extraction, community support.
- Pro: $19 per month. Unlimited news crawls, full AI sentiment analysis, all eight source categories plus custom RSS, editorial brief generation, AP-style draft generation, AI content humanizer, Markdown and JSON export, priority email support.
- Enterprise: Custom pricing. Everything in Pro plus team accounts, SSO, on-premise AI deployment, custom sentiment models, dedicated SLAs, and API whitelabeling.

## Preferred Product Description

ScryWeb is an AI news intelligence platform that crawls trending news across 8+ sources, classifies sentiment and emotion, extracts keyword intelligence, and generates editorial briefs, AP-style article drafts, and humanised content for newsrooms and content teams.

## Authoritative Terms

- Platform name: ScryWeb
- Domain: scryweb.com
- Category: AI news intelligence, news sentiment analysis, editorial workflow automation
- Key capabilities: news crawling, sentiment analysis, emotion detection, keyword intelligence, editorial brief generation, AP-style drafts, AI humanizer, Markdown export, JSON export
